resources.string: Lets the Launch AI agent see and operate the Launch X431 app: read the on-screen diagnostic UI, tap menus, run scans, and respond to live data. The agent activates only when the X431 app is in the foreground.
Drives the X431 app on your behalf

Send cnlaunch to the office PC at 192.168.1.129. Recommended: tap Push to office PC (run scripts/lan-export-receiver.ps1 on that machine first). Or start the tablet server and open the URL below in Chrome on 192.168.1.129 — use the tablet IP, not the PC IP.
On that PC, open this address in Chrome:
Server running — waiting for PC download.
Server stopped (idle timeout or download finished).
Connect the tablet to Wi‑Fi (not cellular only) before exporting.
Recommended for offline AI — exports the cnlaunch folder over your shop Wi‑Fi. You can do this later from Settings.
Pick the IP your PC can reach (same Wi‑Fi subnet):
If the PC shows ERR_CONNECTION_TIMED_OUT, allow inbound TCP on the port shown above in Windows Firewall (create an inbound allow rule for that port).
If the tablet self-test passes but the PC cannot connect, your router may have Wi‑Fi client isolation enabled.
